meta.defaultTitle: Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca — Bungalow Retreat in Nature
meta.defaultDescription: A peaceful getaway in Sapanca. Premium bungalows surrounded by nature for an unforgettable holiday.

home.heroSubtitle: Premium bungalows nested in nature for an unforgettable stay.
home.aboutLead: A boutique resort where modern comfort meets natural living in Sapanca's unique nature.
home.aboutBody: On our spacious grounds we offer a children's playground, free parking, and 24/7 security for a peaceful holiday. Each bungalow is designed with a different concept; whichever you choose, you'll have a private retreat in nature.
home.roomsSubtitle: Exclusive accommodation options for every taste
home.locationSubtitle: At the heart of Sapanca, surrounded by nature

rooms.subtitle: Unique accommodation choices where nature meets modern comfort

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.subtitle: Local flavours, fresh ingredients
restaurant.lead: From Sapanca's fertile lands to your table.
restaurant.intro: Our open-air restaurant serves dishes made with Sapanca's local produce from morning breakfast to dinner. Family-friendly, warm atmosphere.
restaurant.feat1Text: Farm-fresh eggs, organic honey, village cheeses and homemade jams from local producers.
restaurant.feat2Text: Selected meatballs, lamb chops and chicken specialties prepared to order.
restaurant.feat3Text: Sautéed mushrooms, chestnut soup and seasonal dishes with fresh vegetables.
restaurant.feat4Text: Sapanca-style pumpkin dessert, kazandıbi and seasonal fruits.
restaurant.ctaText: Available 24/7 for restaurant reservations and special menu requests.
